tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 

(Repeats through song)


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
     And another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh why can I not conquer love?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
And I might have thought that we were one[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Wanted to fight this war without weapons[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I wanted it, I wanted it bad[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
But there were so many red flags[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Now another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, lets be clear, I trust no one[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You did not break me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I'm still fighting for peace[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Well, I've got thick skin and an elastic heart,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
But your blade, It might be too sharp[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
I'm like a rubber band until you pull too hard,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, I may snap and I move fast[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But you won't see me fall apart[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I've got an elastic heart[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I've got an elastic heart[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, I've got an elastic heart[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
     And I will stay up through the night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
And let's be clear, won't close my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
And I know that I can survive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'll walk through fire to save my life[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And I want it, I want my life so bad[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm doing everything I can[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Then another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
It's hard to lose a chosen one[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You did not break me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I'm still fighting for peace[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Well, I've got thick skin and an elastic heart,[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
